8954.history: After commissioning USS SC-737 sailed from the Brooklyn Navy Yard to Cuba; thence through the Panama Canal; thence to Australia, New Guinea, Philippines. Based at Dulang, Leyte, then to Palawan, and Borneo.It was in Brunie Bay, Borneo on 8 August 1945, the day Japan surrendered. USS SC 737 was decommissioned in December of 1945, and was turned over to the Philippine Navy at Sumar Island, Philippines.
